sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41254" key="e)pita/raxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτάρ-ᾰχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n41254.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">liable to disturbance, easily alarmed,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:38:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
